TARANG.title: Tarang Smart RF Finder User Manual
TARANG.text: Welcome to the Tarang Smart RF Finder user manual. Thank you for choosing Tarang. Tarang is a wireless radio frequency finder designed to help you quickly locate important belongings such as keys, wallets, bags, remote controls, and many other personal items. The package contains one RF transmitter, two RF receivers, one USB Type-C charging cable, and this user manual. Before using the product for the first time, fully charge the receiver using the supplied USB Type-C cable. Connect the receiver to a standard five volt USB charger. The red indicator shows that charging is in progress. When the blue indicator turns on, charging is complete. Disconnect the charger after the battery is fully charged. Switch on the receiver and attach it to the item you wish to locate. To find your item, press the corresponding button on the transmitter. The paired receiver will immediately flash its LED and produce a loud buzzer. Follow the sound and flashing light until you locate your belongings. If the receiver does not respond, ensure that it is switched on, fully charged, and within the operating range of the transmitter. Low battery may reduce the operating range and buzzer volume. Recharge the receiver whenever you notice reduced performance. Do not immerse the product in water or expose it to excessive heat. Do not attempt to open the battery or repair the product yourself. Use only a standard five volt USB charger for charging. Keep the device clean and dry, and recharge it every few months if it is not used for a long period. Tarang operates using four hundred and thirty-three megahertz radio frequency technology and features a rechargeable battery, bright LED indication, loud buzzer, USB Type-C charging, and long operating range. Please retain your purchase invoice for warranty service. The warranty does not cover physical damage, water damage, misuse, unauthorized repairs, or damage caused by improper charging. For technical support, product updates, or warranty assistance, please contact Marvinno Technologies India Private Limited through our official website or customer support email. Thank you for choosing Tarang Smart RF Finder. We hope it helps you find your valuable belongings quickly and easily.
